pi_items.source: grep search of all environment XML files reveals 'Henderson Chemical Supply' does not exist in any file. Combined with the missing setup script, this facility is fabricated.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for cameo_data_manager_env set_tier2_quantity_ranges task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json output file. The target facility 'Henderson Chemical Supply' does not exist in any of the environment's data files. The other data entry requirements for Sulfuric Acid explicitly match the prompt description.
